old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.56","title":"Recover personal AWS control plane","description":"Hunk-select personal account/profile/region/EBS/fleet-AMI updates in AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and ec2-claude.sh without generated instruction churn.","acceptance_criteria":"All commands target personal account 210337117346 in us-west-2; builder uses us-west-2c and vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb; fleet uses validated AMI; account checks precede writes; bash syntax and read-only resource checks pass; one tagged launch cleans safely.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:58.713458Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:58.713458Z","labels":["aws","validation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.56","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:58.843178Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"Preserve useful inherited notes while proving: (1) `AWS_PROFILE=personal AWS_REGION=us-west-2 aws sts get-caller-identity` returns account 210337117346 before writes; (2) read-only EC2 queries prove vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb is Name=lichen-zephyr-arm64 in us-west-2c and fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f is ARM64 in us-west-2; (3) recovered shell files pass `bash -n` and their read-only/dry-run checks; (4) one uniquely tagged Project=LICHEN launch demonstrates command logging and ownership-checked cleanup; (5) any builder-volume exercise records successful sync, unmount, detach, and `aws ec2 wait volume-available`; (6) evidence includes base/source/patch hashes, tool versions, exact commands with exit status, UTC logs and log SHA-256 values. No skipped command, ignored nonzero status, fallback account/AMI/volume, leaked instance, mounted volume, or merely requested detach counts as success.","description":"Scope: recover only the personal AWS control-plane documentation and scripts needed by this recovery; do not run validation scenarios here. Hunk-select the existing useful account/profile/region/EBS/fleet-AMI changes from the inherited source/patch, without generated instruction churn. Every AWS command must set AWS_PROFILE=personal and AWS_REGION=us-west-2 and first prove `aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text` is exactly 210337117346. Builder operations are restricted to us-west-2c and the sole approved cache volume vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb (Name=lichen-zephyr-arm64); fleet operations use ARM64 AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f and never attach that EBS volume. Record source base commit, selected patch commit or SHA-256, script/tool versions, exact commands, UTC timestamps, exit codes, stdout/stderr logs, instance/volume IDs, and hashes.","design":"Fail closed before every write if account, profile, region, AZ, AMI architecture/ID, volume ID/Name/state, or Project=LICHEN ownership is absent or mismatched. Launches require Project=LICHEN, a unique RunId, LaunchedBy, and Name tags. Cleanup may stop/terminate only instance IDs created by the recorded RunId after re-querying account and tags. Builder cleanup must sync, verify no process uses /mnt/lichen-zephyr, unmount /mnt/lichen-zephyr, detach only vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb from the recorded owned instance, and run `aws ec2 wait volume-available --volume-ids vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb`; unmount, detach, wait, analyzer, log-copy, or ownership-check failure is fatal and must remain visible.","notes":"Common prerequisite for every AWS-dependent recovery bead. The approved builder EBS is single-attach and is the sole untagged-resource exception; identify it by exact ID and Name, never by discovery alone. Fleet AMI instances receive source/artifacts at launch because ami-0764d1b512e22671f contains tools but no repository checkout or credentials."}
